status_boundary: PASS_LEDGER_VALIDATION means SN-C3 was reviewed under PG1-PG8 and SG0-SG4 and classified only as a useful negative control / weak observable comparator. It is not source extraction, not scattering-native validation, not S-matrix victory, not Ising/high-resonance defeat, not substrate selection, not a settling-law proof, and not engineering readiness.

support_summary.allowed_inference: SN-C3 is currently only a useful negative control and weak observable comparator under the static-spine gate
support_summary.blocked_inference: source extraction, scattering-native validation, S-matrix victory, Ising/high-resonance defeat, substrate selection, settling-law proof, or engineering readiness
support_summary.checked_interface: SN-C3 physical scattering-matrix topology reviewed against PG1-PG8 and SG0-SG4 static spine
